calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff A. Ramzaaotti Plumbing Inc. is present. Represented by Donna Killian.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Howell Martin is present.
Attorney Linda Quinn representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated.
